history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A full-body, slightly low-angle selfie of a person standing on a concrete staircase, holding a smartphone in their right hand to take the photo. The person is wearing a grey hooded sweatshirt with a prominent red heart icon and the text "I ♡ NY" printed on the front. They are also wearing plaid shorts in shades of black, white, and grey, and black flip-flops. On their head, they have a white baseball cap with a black graphic design. A black backpack is visible on their shoulders. The background features a textured grey wall on the left and a grey wooden staircase railing with intricate carvings on the right. The lighting is somewhat dim, with a cool tone, creating a casual and urban mood. The color palette is dominated by greys, black, white, and the pop of red from the heart.
